data.title: Fartcoin ‘Hot Air’ Rises — $1.50 Just A Whiff Away
data.description:
One of the most intriguing cryptocurrencies, Fartcoin (FART), has made surprising gains as a spate of market turbulence in April 2025 reached new heights. The meme token, trading at $0. 83 when this report was made, surged 84% in the last week, elevating it into the spotlight of investors as global markets writhed in turmoil and tensions between the United States and China reached new highs. Related Reading: Bitcoin Maxi Takes Aim: Ethereum’s True Value? Lower Than You Think Price Nears Critical $1 Milestone Market statistics suggest that Fartcoin is trading under $1 but is testing key resistance levels
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/meme-coins/fartcoin-hot-air-rises-1-50-just-a-whiff-away/

data.title: Bitcoin Whales Surge as Trump’s Tariff Pauses Spark Market FOMO
data.description:
Bitcoin surged back into the spotlight this weekend after President Trump unexpectedly announced a 90-day pause on key tech tariffs on Wednesday.
source: https://zycrypto.com/bitcoin-whales-surge-as-trumps-tariff-pauses-spark-market-fomo/

data.title: Warren Buffett will only start buying up stocks again if the Fed intervenes in the market
data.description:
Warren Buffett, CEO of Berkshire Hathaway and the world’s most successful investor, is currently sitting on $334 billion in cash and history tells us he’s probably not gonna spend any of it on new stock positions unless the Federal Reserve jumps in and stabilizes the market. The Oracle of Omaha hasn’t made any major deals […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/warren-buffett-waiting-for-the-fed/

data.title: Bitcoin rallies amid macroeconomic concerns — Are HYPE, ONDO, RNDR and KAS next?
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) made a brilliant comeback this week, rising more than 7%, indicating solid buying at lower levels. BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes said in a post on X that the US bond market crisis could be setting the stage for more policy response, and that could result in an “up only mode” for Bitcoin. Blockchain and intelligence platform Glassnode said in a post on X that Bitcoin had built solid support at $79,000, with roughly 40,000 Bitcoin accumulated there. Bollinger Bands creator John Bollinger also echoed similar views
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-rallies-amid-macroeconomic-concerns-are-hype-ondo-rndr-and-kas-next?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: What Happened In Crypto Today: BTC, Alts, Market Overview
data.description:
Bitcoin opened on April 13th with a red candle as of writing this report. Binance inflow/outflow data may have interesting insights for the crypto. However, its trajectory remained positive in 3 different time frames: The crypto market total market cap rose over 1% intraday, and the Fear and Greed index continues to signal Fear
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/13/what-happened-in-crypto-today-btc-alts-market-overview/

data.title: Layer 1 MANTRA’s token falls 90% in sudden crash; community lead denies rug pull accusations
data.description:
The sudden collapse of the token has reignited allegations that the Hong Kong-based team controls a large portion of the token's circulating supply.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350665/layer-1-mantras-token-falls-90-in-sudden-crash-community-lead-denies-rug-pull-accusations?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: The market maker algorithm abnormally pushed up the BTCDOM perpetual contract by 20%, possibly due to the OM flash crash and the strategy was triggered by mistake
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: An unidentified market maker made an algorithmic error after the flash crash of OM (Mantra), accidentally raising the BTCDOM (Bitcoin Market Capitalization Index) perpetual contract on the Binance platform by 20%. The BTCDOM index includes the top 20 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization on Binance and Binance Futures. Excluding BTC and stablecoins, the weight of OM is only about 1%. This abnormal fluctuation is suspected to be due to the market maker's mistaken judgment that the sharp fluctuation of OM prices is a change in market structure, and mistakenly triggered a strategic buy operation.

data.title: Trader Sees Bitcoin Repeating November 2024 Breakout, Hints at Massive Bullish Reversal for BTC
data.description:
A crypto analyst who nailed the 2021 Bitcoin market meltdown believes that BTC may be in the midst of forming a bullish reversal pattern.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/13/trader-sees-bitcoin-repeating-november-2024-breakout-hints-at-massive-bullish-reversal-for-btc/

data.title: Mantra token price collapses by over 90% in 24 hours
data.description:
The price of the Mantra (OM) token, the native cryptocurrency of the Mantra real-world tokenized asset blockchain, has collapsed by over 90% in the last 24 hours. On April 13, Mantra fell from a price of approximately $6. 3 to below $0. 50 and shed over 90% of its $6 billion market cap
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/mantra-price-collapses-by-over-90?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
